items.text: GCAS_singleton component shall declare a height variable
items.fragment: GCAS_singleton component shall declare a height variable
items.requirement_fragment: GCAS_singleton component shall declare a height variable

items.text: GCAS_singleton component shall invoke the kinematicLinearization function from the gcas_nodes library to compute the height value
items.fragment: GCAS_singleton component shall invoke the kinematicLinearization function from the gcas_nodes library to compute the height value
items.requirement_fragment: GCAS_singleton component shall invoke the kinematicLinearization function from the gcas_nodes library to compute the height value

items.text: GCAS_singleton component shall set the recovery time to 8.7
items.fragment: GCAS_singleton component shall set the recovery time to 8.7
items.requirement_fragment: GCAS_singleton component shall set the recovery time to 8.7

items.text: GCAS_singleton component shall set the failure time to 16.0
items.fragment: GCAS_singleton component shall set the failure time to 16.0
items.requirement_fragment: GCAS_singleton component shall set the failure time to 16.0

items.text: Once simulation time exceeds the recovery time of 8.7, the height value must always remain greater than the minimum allowed height of 200.0
items.fragment: Once simulation time exceeds the recovery time of 8.7, the height value must always remain greater than the minimum allowed height of 200.0
items.requirement_fragment: Once simulation time exceeds the recovery time of 8.7, the height value must always remain greater than the minimum allowed height of 200.0

items.text: Once simulation time exceeds the recovery time of 8.7, the current height must be strictly greater than the height value from the previous time step
items.fragment: Once simulation time exceeds the recovery time of 8.7, the current height must be strictly greater than the height value from the previous time step
